turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Your service is a joke and you clearly don't care about customers at all!

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: I hear you, and I'm sorry this has been so frustrating. Let me personally make it right.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: ...Fine. I appreciate you actually listening, at least.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Sorry for snapping at you. It's been a rough day and you didn't deserve that.
